title: Příkaz mini todo a /mini:todo
goal: Add a persistent archive of future ideas and changes in .mini/todo.md, managed by a non-interactive 'mini todo' command (list / add "<text>" / done|remove <n>) and a '/mini:todo' slash command for viewing and appending from Claude Code; the 'mini next' prompt surfaces the open todo items as candidate phase ideas so the human (or an autonomous run) can pick one instead of inventing from scratch.

steps.title: Todo store and markdown format
steps.detail: Add .mini/todo.md backed by a todoPath in store.ts; parse/serialize a markdown checklist (- [ ] open, - [x] done) into typed items {text, done}; round-trip unit test.

steps.title: mini todo command
steps.detail: Non-interactive command in commands/todo.ts registered in cli.ts: bare 'mini todo' lists items (numbered, open/done), 'add "<text>"' appends an open item, 'done <n>' / 'remove <n>' act on the 1-based index; idempotent and TTY-free; unit tests for each subcommand.

steps.title: next prompt surfaces open todos
steps.detail: Extend buildNextPhasePrompt with an optional '# Ideas in the backlog' block listing open todo items as candidate phase ideas; wire context.ts to load .mini/todo.md and pass it; prompt snapshot/unit test covers presence and absence.

steps.title: /mini:todo slash command
steps.detail: Add a 'todo' entry to install/commands.ts COMMANDS with its own body (like status: runs 'mini todo' to view, 'mini todo add' to append) and an argumentHint; update install-commands test/snapshot.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document 'mini todo' and '/mini:todo' (the ideas/changes archive that next draws from) in README and add an English CHANGELOG entry.
